payload.label: bed

payload.long_description: Bed with a tall dark wooden headboard and neatly made beige-and-gray horizontal striped bedding with two matching pillows centered against the headboard; mattress and foot area fill the foreground and the lower edge is cropped by the image (camera ~1.5 m away).
